DOCKER_VERSION.description: Specific version of docker to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

DOCKER_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install DOCKER. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

DOCKER_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for DOCKER to listen on

DOCKER_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for DOCKER to listen on

DOCKER_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for DOCKER to listen on
